title: 第2節　納品口の死角

prompt: Create one cinematic 16:9 scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第1章　朝の湯気 / 第2話　黒い珈琲と紙袋. Shared talk background: 第1章第2話のパン屋と喫茶店背景. Background reference prompt: Cinematic spring Sunday morning environment at a familiar neighborhood bakery with an attached kissaten near the White Heron River district. Show a warm bread display, dark coffee cups, a few window seats, a side delivery entrance, paper bread bags, and gentle morning light. The place should feel lived-in, local, slightly old-fashioned, and perfect for a quiet black coffee. Preserve the same place, architecture, time of day, weather, lighting, and atmosphere unless the scene text explicitly changes them. Use the same talk-level setting as the shared stage, but show it from a hidden security-side, reverse angle, blind spot, rear approach, service path, or protected backside when appropriate. Scene focus: 第2節　納品口の死角 / セラパート. Summary: 豆袋にしては軽すぎた。 麻袋の膨らみは不自然で、底の角だけが硬い。中身は豆ではなく拘束具と緩衝材、それに簡易の鎮静装置だと分かれば、計画は見えたも同然だった。パン屋と喫茶店のあ… Key beats: 豆袋にしては軽すぎた。 麻袋の膨らみは不自然で、底の角だけが硬い。中身は豆ではなく拘束具と緩衝材、それに簡易の鎮静装置だと分かれば、計画は見えたも同然だった。パン屋と喫茶店のあいだにある細い納品口へ誘い込み、車両へ流す。休日の常連客が相手なら、店に馴染んでいるぶん油断も大きいと踏んだのだろう。 セラは裏手の通路に身を置き、配達伝票の束に見せかけた端末を先に潰した。最初の男が台車を引き込もうとした瞬間、彼女は前輪へ薄い金具を差し込み、車輪の向きだけを奪う。台車は壁際へ鈍く噛み、麻袋の列は予定していた角度を失った。 二人目には肩口から入って膝を折らせた。三人目が車両側の扉を開ける前に通信だけを落とす。音は出ない。店内へ届くのは、せいぜい台車が段差で鳴らした一度きりの硬い響きだけでいい。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-episode: サトー. Keep him consistent with the episode-specific portrait generated from the canonical Sato image. sera: セラ. Keep her consistent with the canonical Sera portrait, including the visible cat-ear support-security unit, without adding installment-specific redesign. The support unit is completed by the cat-ear headband alone, so do not add backpack rigs, back-mounted devices, extra mechanical arms, exoskeleton parts, visible cable bundles, or any other extra machinery. Do not give her knives, daggers, swords, blades, or any other bladed weapon. Compose for a 1920x1080 delivery, keep main subjects near the center, and preserve enough left/right safe margin so the image still reads well in portrait scrolling mode. Focus characters: sera. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: Sera must be the clear foreground subject of the image. Do not show any restrained, injured, collapsed, seated, or captured person who resembles Sato. Any attackers must be visually distinct from Sato: no ponytail, no mustache, no chin beard, no chambray shirt, no denim outfit matching Sato, and no similar face or body impression. If Sato appears at all, show only one Sato as a small unaware background figure separated from the confrontation. Use the installment-specific Sato portrait for Sato. Use Sera's canonical portrait directly without redesigning her for this installment. Sera never carries knives or other bladed weapons; if she uses a tool, keep it small, discreet, and non-bladed. For Sato-side images, Sato is dominant and any Sera presence must stay clearly separate and unreadable as a casual companion. For Sera-side images, Sera is dominant, the attacker must not resemble Sato, and Sato must remain an unaware background figure looking elsewhere. Preserve the feeling of a refined but ordinary Sunday, and compose for a 1920x1080 delivery with the main subjects near the center and safe margins on both sides so the image also works in portrait scrolling layouts.  Make Sera the unmistakable visual protagonist. Attackers must read as unrelated men, not as Sato or copies of Sato.
